actors.name: Operations Analyst
actors.description: Primary user who reviews exception queues, resolves discrepancies, and approves reconciled batches.
actors.interactions: Initiates manual overrides; receives exception alerts; approves batch closures.

actors.name: Core Ledger System
actors.description: Tier-1 system of record for all financial transactions. Source of truth for debit/credit postings.
actors.interactions: Publishes transaction events; receives settlement confirmation callbacks.

actors.name: Payments Gateway
actors.description: Tier-1 system that routes outgoing and incoming payment instructions to external networks.
actors.interactions: Provides payment execution status; receives reconciliation match results.

actors.name: Reporting Warehouse
actors.description: Tier-2 data warehouse used for management reporting and regulatory submissions.
actors.interactions: Consumes reconciliation output; provides historical settlement data for audit.

actors.name: Compliance Officer
actors.description: Reviews audit logs and exception reports for regulatory examination preparation.
actors.interactions: Reads audit trail reports; approves regulatory submission packages.
